Appearances:
Plaintiff Nasir Patel is present and in Pro Per.
Defendant Allan Miller is present.
Attorney Elaine K. Lee representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Andy Westley, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAR-04-2013 is vacated.
